title: Mistress Mouse and the Great Penguin Car Race
summary: Mistress Mouse receives an urgent phone call: the big race is today! After a quick snack of dried apples and water, she jumps into her race car and heads to the starting line at the finish line. Facing off against Mischief Mouse in a borrowed tow truck and Mama Mouse in a medium-sized black and black car filled with books about junk, the racers speed through hills, dense jungles, and a treacherous construction site filled with bulldozers and cranes. Just as they hit the final leg, a surprise entrant, Daddy Mouse, takes the lead in a two-wheeled orange penguin car. However, in a final burst of speed, Mistress Mouse crosses the finish line first to claim victory in a stunning race with a surprise ending.

highlightQuote.text: No, you don't need to go pee-pee, you can just go in your race car right away.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: About Mistress Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: About Mistress Mouse again? Okay.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No no, about Mistress Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And her race car!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Mistress Mouse in her race car. Once upon a time, Mistress Mouse was driving her race car. Where was she driving it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No no no, she was at her house.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Once upon a time Mistress Mouse was at her house. What was she doing there?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She was calling her phone.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, she picked up the phone and decided to call someone. Who did she call?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Nope, nope, nope. Someone said the race was today.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, someone called Mistress Mouse and said 'the race is today!' And she said, 'Oh great! Where is it?' And what did they say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They said 'It's over hills and you have to get in your race car to drive there.'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I have to get in my race car and it's over hills, is that what you said?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah. And you have to go through the jungle and past the construction site and then all the way through the jungle.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The jungle and then the construction site and then the jungle... that sounds like an amazing race. I'll be there! What time does it start?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Lunch time, so you have to get in your race car.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, thank you, bye-bye. So she hung up her phone and she started to go out the door to get in her race car, but she realized something very important she had to do first. What was that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hmm, I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: She had to have a snack. It's very important to have a snack first. So what did she have for a snack?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dried apple!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: She had some delicious dried apple. And what else?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Um, some water. So she had some water and then she thought, 'Hmm, I wonder if I need to go pee-pee?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, you don't need to go pee-pee, you can just go in your race car right away.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, she decided just to go in her race car right away. So she went out her door and she opened the door of her race car and she got in and then she put the key in the ignition and then vroom, the motor of the race car started up and she backed it out of her driveway and then she drove over to the beginning of the race. At... the race was starting at the Hills.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, no, no. It was starting at the finish line.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, it was starting at the finish line! And so she drove all the way to the finish line and there were lots of other people driving their race cars because they all wanted to be in the race. And... who did she drive up next to that was also driving a car to be in the race?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She was driving a tow truck and it was Mischief Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Mischief Mouse pulled up next to Mistress Mouse. Yeah. They're both mice, they're both driving tow trucks, and they have very similar names, Mistress and Mischief.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Nope, nope, nope.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, sorry. Mistress Mouse was in her race car, not her tow truck. Excuse me.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And the other person borrowed her tow truck.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, the other person... you're saying Mischief Mouse borrowed Mistress Mouse's tow truck?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I see, I see. That was nice of Mistress Mouse to let Mischief Mouse borrow her tow truck. Um, and who else was in the race? Was anyone else racing against them?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Who was it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mischievous Mama Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Mama Mouse! Now Mama Mouse had a very special funny kind of car that was different from all the other cars. What kind of car did Mama Mouse drive?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She drove a... she drove a nice car that was very funny.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It was funny? What was funny about it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Because it had so much stuff in it and it had a book about junk in it.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Mama Mouse's car had a book about junk in it? Yeah. What color was her car?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was black and black.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Black and black. And was it a small car or a big car?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was a medium car.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It was a medium-sized black and black car with a book about junk in it. So Mama Mouse drove up to enter the race. Okay, and did anyone else want to join the race, or was it just those?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's just those.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, and then it was time for the race to begin! The announcer said, 'On your mark, get ready, get set, start your engines, vroom vroom vroom, GO!' And then vroom, all the cars...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And what else did the announcer say?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The announcer said, 'And Mama Mouse takes the lead with her fast medium-sized black and black car!' And it zoomed up the hill and down the hill and into the jungle. And then all three cars were very close to each other. Mistress Mouse was...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And what else... what else did the announcer say?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Mischief Mouse is coming up close behind Mama Mouse, and Mistress Mouse is coming up close behind Mischief Mouse. All three cars are very close in this very close race as we begin driving through the jungle.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And what else... the announcer say?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then the announcer said, 'It's almost time that we pass out of the jungle into the next part of the race, which is the construction site, which is a very difficult part of the racecourse because it winds and turns and they might have to drive very carefully so that they don't drive off the road and crash into the buildings on the construction site and there's big bulldozers and diggers and cranes all over that they have to drive their cars around and zoom, swerve, squeal, squeak, vroom vroom, all the cars zoomed right through the construction site and as they came out the other end, it was Mischief Mouse in the lead, followed by Mistress Mouse and followed by Mama Mouse hot on their tail. They were all driving fast in their...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What else did the announcer say?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And now it's time for all the cars to come into the jungle again, the last leg of the race. They vroomed into the jungle underneath the big tall jungle trees with monkeys on the branches going 'hoo hoo hoo' as they watch the race. And they drove through the hilly part of the jungle, up and down and then down along the side the river in the jungle, vroom, and then there was an elephant in the jungle going pbbt and they drove past the elephant, vroom. And finally, just as they're coming out of the jungle and around back to the finish line, and they are all going as fast as they can, vroom vroom vroom, racing, racing, racing, and then who's in the lead?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Daddy Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Daddy! A surprise entrance to the race is Daddy Mouse! And what kind of a car was Daddy Mouse driving?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He was driving a penguin car.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A penguin car! Wow, what color penguin car was he driving?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He was driving an orange pink penguin car.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: An orange penguin car. How many wheels does a penguin car have?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It has two.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It has two wheels. Wow, that sounds amazing. So Daddy Mouse was a surprise leader in the race. He pulled out ahead of Mama Mouse and Mischief Mouse and Mistress Mouse and he's winning the race just as they come out of the jungle and around back to the finish line and they are all going as fast as they can, vroom vroom vroom, racing, racing, racing, and then the winner is...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mistress Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wait, Mischief or Mistress?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mistress.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Mistress Mouse wins the race! And what else did the announcer say?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The announcer said 'Congratulations to all of the racers, what a stunning race with a surprise ending. Come back next time for our next race on this amazing race track. The end.'

characters.name: Mistress Mouse
characters.description: A polite three-year-old mouse and resourceful shopkeeper, this community cornerstone balances a bold artistic spirit with sharp mechanical grit. Whether crafting intricate Lego creations in her sunroom or piloting her signature pink tow truck to solve puzzles and assist neighbors, she is a master of the road and a multi-talented creator. From famously adorning cars with blue stripes to dominating the race track, her inventive soul is always on the move. Usually seen in a mushroom-adorned cardboard hat with an orange sparkle purse, this resourceful driver remains an essential, evocative fixture of every neighborhood adventure.

characters.name: Mischief Mouse
characters.description: Reigning from a purple-striped Jovian castle, this affable mouse King—a playful-named companion to Pinecone Mouse—is a seasoned adventurer, guardian of the Underground Library, and Hattie’s steadfast ally. Between savoring artisanal cheeses and awaiting a rugged cardboard replacement for his fragile Lego hat, he spends leisure hours meticulously constructing and gleefully smashing soaring towers. A pancake-loving monarch who once tended shop for mountain-dwelling traffic cones, his cosmic quests recently shifted from the stars to the speedway; having borrowed a tow truck from Mistress Mouse, he proved a formidable competitor who nearly clinched a stunning victory. Whether piloting starships or joining the group’s latest trek to Nana’s house, he remains a vigilant protector and devoted friend across the galaxy.

characters.name: Mama Mouse
characters.description: The devoted matriarch of the Blind Mice family and watchful guardian of the household, she balances the sweet lilt of nightly lullabies with the adrenaline of a seasoned racer. Behind the wheel of her medium-sized black car—carrying a well-thumbed book on the secrets of junk—she guards Hattie and Avery’s peace as fiercely as she commands the asphalt.

characters.name: Daddy Mouse
characters.description: A surprise late entrant to the race who drives an orange two-wheeled penguin car.

characters.name: Monkeys
characters.description: Inhabitants of the jungle who watch the race and cheer from the tree branches.

characters.name: Elephant
characters.description: A colossal, trumpeting behemoth crowned with a vibrant blossom, haunting the misty threshold where salt-sprayed jungles meet turbulent, stormy seas. It remains a stoic, floral-crested sentinel, unmoved as the high-octane shriek of race cars blurs through its ancient, verdant domain.

places.name: Mistress Mouse's House
places.description: Mistress Mouse’s home base is a vibrant sanctuary where high-octane preparation meets playful domesticity. While it serves as the bustling staging ground for her iconic pink tow truck, it is also a private retreat where she tinkers with her toys and enjoys a quiet dinner. This pre-race haven seamlessly blends meticulous engine fine-tuning with the comforts of home, fueling her spirit long before the roar of competition begins.

places.name: The Hills
places.description: A section of the racecourse involving steep climbs and descents.

places.name: The Jungle
places.description: Dimitar’s sanctuary is a sweltering, vapor-thick forest of towering trees and emerald vines, where he builds his home beneath a heavy canopy that shelters kaleidoscopic butterflies and the enigmatic Cindy-Wan the Frog-a-loza. This humid wilderness, teeming with chattering monkeys and a roaming elephant, serves as a wild transit for racers who must navigate its dense, wet depths twice.

places.name: The Construction Site
places.description: A treacherous, winding gauntlet of the racecourse where the path is currently being reclaimed from rubble. Towering cranes and heavy bulldozers loom over the track, flanking a narrow route choked with orange cones and jagged slabs of displaced sidewalk.

places.name: The Finish Line
places.description: The paradoxical beginning and end point of the great race.

places.name: The River
places.description: A mirror-still waterway tracking the edge of the dense jungle path, known to locals as the challenging destination where Pistis Mouse ventures to test the mettle of his little car.
